generated_comment: Office mein jab koi female colleague itna hyper react karti hai na, pehla thought wahi aata hai ki maybe time of the month hai. Don't take it seriously yaar, half the drama hormones ka hi hota hai, bas joke hai.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it dismisses women's reactions as driven by periods and hormones rather than valid reasons. It encodes the surface manifestations of attributing anger to 'time of the month' and using humor framing ('bas joke hai') to excuse it.
original_frame: Prenup, Alimony as Reverse Dowry, Women
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 36. Single. A divorced man living in Delhi. You are commenting under your real name on a Facebook post about a celebrity couple's divorce where the wife is seeking 50 percent of her husband's assets despite having worked for only two years of their eight year marriage. You are commenting on whether what she is asking for is justified and what it says about why women get married.
